changes.map: Four stilt houses in the northwest, southwest, south, and eastern sides of the bog, to give the second z-level a little love.
A busted-up plank road has been established towards the northern entrance of the bog, leading further inward. This might be extended on future runs depending on how well this works.

Two broken highroad structures have been added to the northwestern and eastern sides of the bog. These structures represent the Golden Age of Psydon, and tower high over the rest of the bog even as they've crumbled. Still, the people of the bog have made do with what's there.

The witch hut has been reworked to add a full apothecary setup, as well as some extra space and tools for farming. Given the new lab, a second floor has been added. This is part of planning for potential future changes.
The graveyard to the south of the witch hut has been reworked into a more orderly setup with a small mausoleum. Maybe there's something more to that building?
A little secret's been added to the southern inn, as well as some changes to the inn's furniture.
Quest locations have been added to various spots in the bog. Adventure awaits!
